gigapan.description:
Hardcore is a local institution, providing coffee and the like and providing a place for community.

There are lots of chairs and tables, free wifi, and a wide selection of people to chat with.

Hard core is my largest 'third place.' (http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Third_place)

Phillip
